    title: 'ITR Filing Deadline Approaching: Over 1.7 Crore Filed for AY 2026-27',
    source: 'Income Tax India (Twitter)',
    date: '2026-07-11',
    summary: 'The Income Tax Department is urging taxpayers to file their Income Tax Returns (ITRs) for Assessment Year 2026-27 before the July 31, 2026 deadline.       { label: 'Action Required', text: 'File your ITR 1 and ITR 2 returns promptly to avoid the last-minute rush.' },

income-tax-india-t-2026-07-11-itr-filing.title: ITR Filing Deadline Approaching: Over 1.7 Crore Filed for AY 2026-27
income-tax-india-t-2026-07-11-itr-filing.summary: The Income Tax Department is urging taxpayers to file their Income Tax Returns (ITRs) for Assessment Year 2026-27 before the July 31, 2026 deadline. Over 1.7 crore taxpayers have already filed, with a significant number filing yesterday. If you haven't filed your ITR 1 or ITR 2 yet, it's time to act to avoid last-minute rush and potential issues.
